name: GLOMUS TUMOR
definition: composed of cells closely resembling modified smooth muscle cells of glomus bodies of GLOMANGIOPERICYTOMA = SINONASAL-TYPE HEMANGIOPERICYTOMA

demographics.Histo: closely packed cells (= high cellularity) forming short fascicles, sometimes exhibiting

dominant_finding: soft tissue mass with strong enhancement
discriminating_features: soft tissue mass with strong enhancement
extension into orbits + intracranial compartment and destruction of adjacent bone (if
tumor isointense relative to muscle on T1WI
hypo- to isointense relative to muscle on T2WI

CT: soft tissue mass with strong enhancement
extension into orbits + intracranial compartment and destruction of adjacent bone (if
MR: tumor isointense relative to muscle on T1WI
hypo- to isointense relative to muscle on T2WI
